caption.full:
Disney+ announces 2027 documentary about Julie Andrews

A new documentary chronicling Julie Andrews' life and career is set to debut on Disney+ in 2027. Directed and produced by R.J. Cutler, the film will feature rare archival footage and new interviews. It will explore her journey from British vaudeville to global superstardom.

Which Julie Andrews role shaped your love for musicals?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #JulieAndrews #Julie Andrews Documentary
caption.firstComment: My heart still flutters from her first note in Mary Poppins — which performance of hers changed you most?

youtube.description:
Julie Andrews is getting her own documentary on Disney+ in 2027, directed by R.J. Cutler. The film will feature rare archival footage and new interviews, covering her rise from vaudeville to global superstardom. R.J. Cutler called her a 'cultural touchstone.'
